creator: Nakai@Mlab.t.u-tokyo.ac.jp
text:
I have been made and uploaded a new port.
It is SEGA GameGear emulator.
ftp://ftp.noc.titech.ac.jp/pub/tmp/aki/in.coming/PORTS/Nakai/mastergear.tgz
This GameGear ports need ROM images to play or check it. Please get them
from 
http://consider.ferris.edu:8000/gamegear/gamegear.html
Please take a look.
				Yukihiro Nakai
				<Nakai@Mlab.t.u-tokyo.ac.jp>
